connectionTest.method: HTTP GET via proxy → API returns exit IP

linkedInAccessTest.notes: LinkedIn public profiles accessible via T-Mobile US mobile carrier IP. Mobile carrier IPs blend with authentic LinkedIn mobile app traffic, bypassing datacenter and residential IP filters. LinkedIn's anti-bot detection specifically trusts real 4G/5G carrier IPs.

notes: Mobile proxy used by proxyFetch() in src/proxy.ts for all LinkedIn API calls. LinkedIn's anti-scraping system blocks datacenter IPs and many residential proxies, but real mobile carrier IPs (4G/5G from actual cell towers) pass through reliably. Proxies.sx provides authentic T-Mobile US carrier IPs via x402 micropayments.
